news.summary: On May 29, 2025, PKWARE announced their participation in the upcoming 2025 Gartner Security and Risk Conference on June 9. During the conference, they will host a session titled "Data Defense in Action: How Truist & Western Union Stay Secure and Compliant." The session will showcase the strategies employed by Truist and Western Union to ensure data security and compliance. This initiative underscores the importance of safeguarding sensitive information in today's digital landscape. Attendees will gain valuable insights into industry best practices and the evolving landscape of data protection.
news.headline: PKWARE to present at Gartner Conference on June 9, discussing data security with Truist and Western Union. Schedule to be held on May 29, 2025 in Milwaukee.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, the 21st China (Shenzhen) International Cultural Industries Fair commenced at the Shenzhen World Convention and Exhibition Center in SHENZHEN, China. It is expected to attract a large number of participants, including exhibitors and visitors looking to explore the latest trends and innovations in the cultural sector.
news.headline: 21st China (Shenzhen) International Cultural Industries Fair opens at Shenzhen World Convention and Exhibition Center on May 22nd, 2025.

news.summary: The global storage systems market was valued at USD 67.9 billion in 2025 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 9.8%, reaching USD 130.4 billion by 2032. The on-premises segment is expected to hold three-fifths of the market share in 2025, with direct attached storage (DAS) capturing over 1/3 of the market. The BFSI segment is predicted to generate around USD 20.49 billion in revenue in 2025. Asia Pacific is anticipated to be the most lucrative region, holding nearly two-fifths of the global industry revenue share in 2025. The increase in data generation, with the global datasphere expected to reach 175 zettabytes by 2025, is a significant driver for market growth. However, technical complexity, data security concerns, and integration challenges may hinder growth to some extent. Nevertheless, the ongoing digital transformation initiatives across industries are expected to create growth opportunities for efficient and secure data storage solutions.
news.headline: Global Storage Systems Market to reach $130.4 billion by 2032 with a 9.8% CAGR. On-premises segment dominates, Asia Pacific region key revenue pocket. Data growth spurs demand. Technical complexity and privacy concerns may hinder market growth, but digital transformation initiatives present growth opportunities.

news.summary: The positivity surrounding the cryptocurrency market is not just hype, it is a fundamental characteristic. Despite global uncertainties and changes in policies impacting traditional markets, digital assets continue to demonstrate higher emotional strength. This resilience is evident in the steady performance of cryptocurrencies even amidst significant fluctuations in traditional markets.
news.headline: Digital assets have built-in optimism to endure crises. Despite market turmoil, they display emotional resilience.

news.summary: As of May 29, 2025, the worldwide market for Non-Emergency Medical Transportation is anticipated to be worth USD 10.8 billion, with a projected increase to USD 19.9 billion by 2034. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.6%. The data comes from a recent report by The Research Insights.
news.headline: Global non-emergency medical transportation market to grow at 7.6% CAGR, reaching $19.9 billion by 2034 from $10.8 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Renowned cryptocurrency expert Kevin has indicated that Bitcoin is primed for substantial growth following a rare weekly hash ribbons buy signal. Despite cautioning that golden crosses tend to lead to short-term declines in the current bull market, Kevin highlighted the significance of this development, mentioning it has only occurred twice before in Bitcoin's history. The hash ribbons indicator, with a perfect track record on the weekly timeframe according to Kevin, previously signaled a buy at all-time highs in December 2020 when Bitcoin was priced at $20,000. This signal preceded a remarkable 231% surge to $65,000 over a 13-week period, during which Bitcoin demonstrated persistent upward movement. This instance marks the third consecutive week of such a signal. For more details, check out the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: "Bitcoin receives rare hash ribbons buy signal, analyst expects significant upside after previous signal led to 231% rally to $65,000."

news.summary: Grayscale's Dave LaValle, the Global Head of ETFs, urged skeptics to understand the potential of cryptocurrencies. In an interview with Benzinga, LaValle compared the current cryptocurrency landscape to the early days of ETFs' popularity in the 2000s. He emphasized the need for education about assets like Bitcoin, stating that discussions were evolving positively. LaValle clarified that not every portfolio needs Bitcoin but advocated for knowledge. Vice President JD Vance predicted a milestone of 100 million Bitcoin holders. Find the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Grayscale ETF Head urges skeptics to educate themselves about the 'disruptive' potential of Bitcoin and other cryptos.

news.summary: In Winchester, Virginia, Trex [NYSE:TREX], the leading brand of composite decking and residential railing, has launched a new advertising campaign called "Trex Vs." The campaign features a range of activities such as high heels, skateboarding, cartwheels, and fish scales to demonstrate the outdoor resilience of Trex decking and railing products. Created by Nashville-based BUNTIN, the campaign includes commercial spots and digital concepts to showcase the brand's Performance-Engineered™ decking and railing. Trex is known as the world's top brand in this category, emphasizing its ability to withstand everyday wear and tear.
news.headline: New ad campaign "Trex Vs" by Trex showcases composite decking's resilience in everyday life; created by BUNTIN, based in Nashville. Stock symbol: TREX.

news.summary: In San Diego, Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) is launching a new Munchie Meal in collaboration with music icon T-Pain. The T-Pain Munchie Meal is designed for late-night cravings and gaming sessions, perfect for Fortnite marathons or late-night music vibes. This curated feast is the latest addition to Jack's celebrity Munchie Meal series. Stay tuned for more updates on this flavor-packed collaboration.
news.headline: Jack in the Box & T-Pain team up on the ultimate late-night gaming meal, the T-Pain Munchie Meal for marathon sessions.

news.summary: A prominent healthcare technology provider, ReadySet Surgical, has recently made its software platform accessible through the Epic Showroom's Connection Hub. This advancement signifies a significant achievement for ReadySet Surgical as it broadens its presence across the United States. The listing on Connection Hub allows hospitals and surgical centers to easily access ReadySet's innovative solutions for managing the surgical supply chain. This move aims to enhance efficiency and convenience in healthcare settings.
news.headline: ReadySet Surgical now accessible on Epic Showroom's Connection Hub, extending reach to healthcare institutions nationwide.

news.summary: In an exciting collaboration, the esteemed Oklahoma Wildcatters, a prominent team in the Professional Bull Riders (PBR) league, have teamed up with Rujo Boots to establish Rujo Boots as the team's Official Boot Partner. This partnership comes as the Wildcatters embark on their second season in the PBR Camping World Team Series. The season commences with the Wildcatters Days event, set to run from July 11-13 at Paycom Center in Oklahoma. The alliance signifies a significant milestone for both parties involved, highlighting the shared commitment to excellence in the world of professional bull riding.
news.headline: Rujo Boots becomes official boot partner of OK Wildcatters in PBR league as team starts 2nd season. Days event on July 11-13.

news.summary: A report by Everspring explores the AI Search Trends for 2025 in Chicago, indicating a shift among Gen Z individuals who are now bypassing Google for information search. The report highlights the significant impact of AI on student search behavior and enrollment patterns. This new trend signifies a change in the way younger generations are accessing information, with AI technology playing a crucial role in shaping their educational journey.
news.headline: AI is reshaping student search habits as Gen Z skips Google. Everspring's report shows universities are facing consequences.

news.summary: In Sacramento, California, on May 29, 2025, Health Net, a reputable Medi-Cal managed care health plan in California, along with the Centene Foundation, a philanthropic organization, are collaborating to enhance care access, quality, and outcomes. news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by The Conference Board, it was found that 80% of sustainability executives stated that their companies are making changes to their Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) strategies in response to significant policy shifts. This survey reflects the evolving landscape of corporate sustainability initiatives and highlights the increasing importance of ESG considerations in today's business environment.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, May Mobility, Inc. based in Ann Arbor, Michigan, announced a significant partnership aimed at enhancing the global scaling abilities of its driverless operations. news.summary: On May 29, 2025, CME Group and CF Benchmarks, a top provider of cryptocurrency benchmark indices, revealed their collaboration to introduce four fresh cryptocurrency reference rates and real-time indices for Arbitrum. This initiative aims to provide more comprehensive and accurate assessments for the cryptocurrency market.

news.summary: The Nebraska Spine + Pain Center located in Omaha, Nebraska, recently revealed the installation of the cutting-edge MAGNETOM Free.Max MRI system by Siemens on May 29, 2025. This advanced MRI system is the only one of its kind in the Omaha metro area and boasts an impressive 80 cm bore size, allowing for enhanced imaging capabilities and patient comfort. The installation of this state-of-the-art scanner demonstrates the Nebraska Spine + Pain Center's commitment to providing top-notch medical care and advanced technology to their patients.
news.headline: Nebraska Spine + Pain Center installs MAGNETOM Free.Max, Siemens' next-gen MRI system with 80 cm bore in Omaha, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: On June 3, a gala will be held to honor leaders in the fields of innovation, policy, and research in artificial intelligence (AI). The event will feature notable individuals such as Senator Todd Young, Congressmen Jay Obernolte and Ted Lieu, Vice Admiral Frank Whitworth, SandboxAQ CEO Jack Hidary, and the Vatican's Adviser on AI Ethics. The gala is set to take place in Washington and is scheduled for May 29.
news.headline: AI network in Washington to celebrate inaugural AI Honors on June 3. Honorees include Senator Todd Young, Congressmen Jay Obernolte and Ted Lieu, Vice Admiral Frank Whitworth, SandboxAQ CEO Jack Hidary, and Vatican's Adviser on AI Ethics.

news.summary: This updated article clarifies EQTY Lab's partnership with Intel and NVIDIA. Dr. Leemon Baird, co-founder of Hedera (CRYPTO: HBAR), believes artificial intelligence will speed up blockchain adoption by allowing non-technical users to develop easily. Baird predicts that "everything valuable in the world" will be tokenized within five years. During an interview with Benzinga at Consensus 2025, Baird mentioned the challenges of building AI systems and introduced AI Studio as a solution to simplify the process. Hedera's AI Studio collaborates with Eliza OS and includes an MCP server and SDK to democratize blockchain development and address security concerns. For the full story, visit the article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Hedera co-founder predicts tokenization of everything valuable in 5 years, leveraging AI for blockchain accessibility.

This move signifies Cerity Partners' commitment to expanding their services for individuals and businesses in Scottsdale. As of May 29, 2025, the firm has solidified its presence in the market, bolstering its position as a prominent independent wealth management firm in the U.S.
news.headline: Cerity Partners expands to Arizona with Chad Wing and Dustin Brutton, serving individuals and businesses. Market reach in Scottsdale.

news.summary: Metronet, a leading internet service provider, revealed plans to introduce their 100% fiber-optic internet service in Peoria, Arizona. Renowned as the "Fastest Major ISP" for two consecutive years by PCMag, Metronet aims to enhance high-speed connectivity throughout the state. In a significant move, they will invest $58.5 million to establish a cutting-edge fiber infrastructure in Peoria. This infrastructure will offer speeds of up to five gigabits per second for residential properties and ten gigabits per second for businesses.
news.headline: Metronet invests $58.5 million to bring 100% fiber internet to Peoria, Arizona, with speeds up to 5 Gbps for homes.

news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Wi-Fi 7 Market Forecast to 2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Wi-Fi 7 Market had a value of USD 1.3 Billion in 2025 and is forecasted to reach USD 22.9 Billion by 2030, demonstrating a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 61.5%. This comprehensive report presents an analysis of the global Wi-Fi 7 market, highlighting market trends and projections. It encompasses global revenue data in millions of dollars for the base year 2024, estimates for 2025, and anticipated CAGRs from 2025 to 2030.
news.headline: Wi-Fi 7 market forecasted to reach $22.9 billion by 2030 from $1.3 billion in 2025, growing at CAGR of 61.5% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: The Artist Discovery Program is set to feature the unique artworks of Caribbean artists during a family vacation in Miami. Scheduled for May 29, 2025, this initiative aims to highlight the rich culture and talent of the region. news.headline: Royal Caribbean has selected the next cohort of local Caribbean artists to feature on Star of the Seas, showcasing their artworks on family vacations. Characters: 100

news.summary: Singapore, on May 29, 2025 - HTX DAO and HTX Ventures, key components of the HTX ecosystem, recently joined Bitcoin 2025, a top-notch Bitcoin summit in Las Vegas. At the event, they collaborated with prominent figures in the cryptocurrency realm to analyze the upcoming trends in Bitcoin. This joint effort signifies a significant step towards the progress of cryptocurrencies, as it brings together minds from varying backgrounds to delve into the potential of Bitcoin.
